home.title: NeuralUI — Angular Design System
home.subtitle: High-quality components with Signals and OnPush, production-ready.

hero.subtitle: Modern Angular component library, built with Signals, OnPush and URL state. No external dependencies.

components.button: Button with 4 variants, 3 sizes and loading state
components.card: Content surface with header, body and footer
components.input: Text field with floating label and validation
components.select: Custom dropdown with keyboard and Forms support
components.table: Table with URL-driven search, sort and pagination

urlState.label: URL State
urlState.desc: Search, pagination and sorting stored in the browser bar.

accessible.label: Accessible
accessible.desc: ARIA roles, keyboard navigation and focus management.

tokens.label: CSS Design Tokens
tokens.desc: CSS variables for colors, spacing, shadows and typography.

templates.title: Premium Templates
templates.subtitle: Dashboards and landing pages built with NeuralUI.

form.title: Form Controls
form.subtitle: Textarea, Switch, Checkbox and Radio with ControlValueAccessor.

feedback.title: Feedback Pro
feedback.subtitle: Tooltip and Toast for high-end dashboards.

cta.title: Have ideas? Contribute.
cta.desc: NeuralUI is open source. Open a PR or check the repository on GitHub.

textarea.desc: Textarea with floating label and optional auto-resize support.
textarea.label: Description

switch.desc: Animated toggle with Electric-Blue. Compatible with Reactive Forms.

checkbox.terms: I accept the terms and conditions

radio.desc: Single-selection group. The group implements ControlValueAccessor.

tooltip.desc: [neuTooltip] directive using CDK Overlay. Responds to hover and focus.
tooltip.top: Tooltip on top — great for action icons

toast.desc: Floating notifications. Mobile: bottom center. Desktop: top right corner.
